setup.reference_set: ImageNet val 2K (2 per class, center crop 256, BICUBIC)
setup.hardware: NVIDIA B200 x 2 (baseline GPU 0, K3_tbased GPU 2)

notes: FID gap +0.069 is essentially zero (vs +1.90 at 20-step PoC — noise floor was the issue)
Per-image speedup 1.256x matches 100-step canonical paired measurement (1.273x)
Quality preservation is conclusively demonstrated at paper-grade scale
Paper-ready numbers: 1.26x speedup with FID gap 0.07 (well within measurement noise)
